title: Automation for due date tied to item creation
excerpt: One of my teams has “timeframe” as part of their job logging form, which can be standard (3-5 days), by a specific date or time, or urgent. On creation, urgent jobs are automatically flagged for review. However, we get c…

posts.author: MrSamM (Sam Morrison)
posts.cookedHtml:
One of my teams has “timeframe” as part of their job logging form, which can be standard (3-5 days), by a specific date or time, or urgent. On creation, urgent jobs are automatically flagged for review. However, we get clients logging a job as due by a specific date or time but with less than 3 days’ notice. Because it’s not flagged urgent, the automation doesn’t trigger.

It would be good if there was a conditional automation tied to item creation for “and due date is [less/more] than [days] away” so automation can be triggered in these situations as well.
